A

AbstractNpcAPI - Class in noppes.npcs.api
This object stores functions available to all scripting handlers through the "API" keyword.

DESPAWN_FORCE_NATURAL - Static variable in interface noppes.npcs.api.handler.data.INaturalSpawn

DESPAWN_FORCE_PERSISTENT - Static variable in interface noppes.npcs.api.handler.data.INaturalSpawn
Despawn mode: force persistent (never despawn).
DESPAWN_PRESERVE_TEMPLATE - Static variable in interface noppes.npcs.api.handler.data.INaturalSpawn

executeAbility(String) - Method in interface noppes.npcs.api.ability.IDataAbilities
Execute an ability on this NPC by key (built-in name or custom UUID).

executeCommand(String) - Method in interface noppes.npcs.api.block.IBlockScripted
On servers the enable-command-block option in the server.properties needs to be set to true
Use /gamerule commandBlockOutput false/true to turn off/on command block feedback
Setting NpcUseOpCommands to true in the CustomNPCs.cfg should allow the npc to run op commands, be warned this could be a major security risk, use at own risk
For permission plugins the commands are run under uuid:c9c843f8-4cb1-4c82-aa61-e264291b7bd6 and name:[customnpcs]
executeCommand(String) - Method in interface noppes.npcs.api.entity.ICustomNpc
Executes a command as the NPC.

Returns the position (IPos) corresponding to the final obstructed point along the entity's look vector, with detailed stopping conditions.

Applies damage to this entity using a generic damage source.

Applies damage to this entity using a custom damage source.

I

IAbility - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability
Interface for NPC abilities.
IAbilityAction - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability
Common API interface for all combat actions (abilities and chained abilities).
IAbilityCharge - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Charge abilities.
IAbilityCounter - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Counter abilities.
IAbilityCutter - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Cutter abilities.
IAbilityDash - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Dash abilities.
IAbilityDefend - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for defensive abilities (Guard, Counter, Dodge).
IAbilityDisc - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Disc abilities.
IAbilityDodge - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Dodge abilities.
IAbilityEffect - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Effect abilities.
IAbilityEnergyBeam - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Energy Beam abilities.
IAbilityEnergyProjectile - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
Shared API interface for energy projectile abilities (Orb, Disc, Beam, LaserShot).
IAbilityEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events related to NPC ability execution.
IAbilityEvent.CompleteEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an ability completes its full execution cycle.
IAbilityEvent.ExecuteEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an ability enters the ACTIVE phase and performs its effect.
IAbilityEvent.HitEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an ability hits an entity with damage.
IAbilityEvent.InterruptEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an ability is interrupted by damage.
IAbilityEvent.StartEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an ability starts executing (enters WINDUP phase).
IAbilityEvent.TickEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired every tick while an ability is executing.
IAbilityEvent.ToggleEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a toggle ability is switched ON or OFF.
IAbilityEvent.ToggleUpdateEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired every 10 ticks for each active toggle ability.
IAbilityGuard - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Guard abilities.
IAbilityHandler - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability
Handler for ability registration and creation.
IAbilityHandler - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Handler for ability management.
IAbilityHazard - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Hazard abilities.
IAbilityHeavyHit - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Heavy Hit abilities.
IAbilityLaser - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Laser abilities.
IAbilityOrb - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Orb abilities.
IAbilityProjectile - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Projectile abilities.
IAbilityShockwave - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Shockwave abilities.
IAbilitySlam - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Slam abilities.
IAbilitySweeper - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Sweeper abilities.
IAbilityTeleport - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Teleport abilities.
IAbilityTrap - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Trap abilities.
IAbilityVortex - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for Vortex abilities.
IAbilityZone - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.type
API interface for zone-based abilities (Trap, Hazard).
IAction - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Represents a single "task" that can be executed over multiple ticks, supports delayed start, limited duration, repeating intervals, data storage, and chaining to neighboring tasks.
IActionChain - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
 
IActionListener - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Listener interface for action hooks.
IActionManager - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Manages a queue of IAction instances, allowing scheduling of delayed, repeating, or conditional "tasks" for NPC scripting.
IActionQueue - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
 
IAnimal<T extends net.minecraft.entity.passive.EntityAnimal> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents an animal entity with additional behavior such as breeding, following, and mating.

Represents an entity capable of playing animations.

IButton - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.gui
Represents a clickable button component in a custom GUI.
IChainedAbility - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability
API interface for chained abilities - ordered sequences of ability references that execute one after another with configurable delays.
IChainEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events related to chained ability execution lifecycle.
IChainEvent.CompleteEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a chained ability sequence completes all entries.
IChainEvent.InterruptEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a chained ability is interrupted by damage.
IChainEvent.NextEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the chain advances to the next entry in the sequence.
IChainEvent.StartEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a chained ability sequence starts executing.

Base interface for all energy ability entities (Projectiles, Barriers).
IEnergyAnchorData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.data
Configuration for the anchor point of an energy ability projectile.
IEnergyBarrier<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Base interface for energy barrier entities (Dome, Panel).
IEnergyBarrierEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events fired during energy barrier lifecycle and interactions.
IEnergyBarrierEvent.DestroyedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the barrier is destroyed.
IEnergyBarrierEvent.HitEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the barrier is hit by an energy projectile.
IEnergyBarrierEvent.SpawnedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an energy barrier is spawned.
IEnergyBarrierEvent.UpdateEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired each tick while the barrier exists.
IEnergyBeam<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
A directional beam projectile with a trailing path and optional head orb.
IEnergyCombatData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.data
Combat properties for energy ability projectiles.
IEnergyDisc<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
A flat spinning disc projectile with optional boomerang behavior.
IEnergyDisplayData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.data
Visual display properties for energy ability projectiles.
IEnergyDome<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents an energy dome barrier - a spherical shield centered on the caster.
IEnergyExplosion<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents a standalone energy explosion entity.
IEnergyHandler - Interface in noppes.npcs.api
Central controller for creating energy entities and routing energy damage.
IEnergyHomingData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.data
Homing and speed properties for energy ability projectiles.
IEnergyLaser<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
A continuous laser beam that extends outward from its origin along a direction vector.
IEnergyLifespanData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.data
Lifespan properties for energy ability projectiles.
IEnergyLightningData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability.data
Lightning visual effect properties for energy ability projectiles.
IEnergyOrb<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
A spherical homing energy ball.
IEnergyPanel<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents an energy panel barrier - a flat rectangular shield (Wall or Shield mode).
IEnergyProjectile<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Base interface for all energy projectile entities (Orb, Beam, Disc, Laser, Slicer).
IEnergyProjectileEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events fired during energy projectile lifecycle and impacts.
IEnergyProjectileEvent.BlockImpactEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the projectile hits a block.
IEnergyProjectileEvent.EntityImpactEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the projectile hits an entity.
IEnergyProjectileEvent.ExpiredEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the projectile expires without hitting anything.
IEnergyProjectileEvent.FiredEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an energy projectile is launched.
IEnergyProjectileEvent.UpdateEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired each tick while the projectile exists.
IEnergySlicer<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
A thin, wide blade projectile that slices through targets.
IEnergySweeper<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Entity-level interface for sweeper beam entities.
IEnergyZone<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Entity-level interface for zone entities (Hazard and Trap).
IEntity<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents a generic entity in the world.
IEntityItem<T extends net.minecraft.entity.item.EntityItem> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents an item entity in the world.
IEntityLiving<T extends net.minecraft.entity.EntityLiving> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents a living entity (mob, NPC, etc.) that extends the base living functionality.
IEntityLivingBase<T extends net.minecraft.entity.EntityLivingBase> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents a living entity (mob, NPC, etc.) with additional methods to manage health, damage, targeting, vision, potion effects, equipment, and various attributes.

Represents a fish hook entity with additional methods.

Wrapper events for Forge events, allowing scripts to listen for native Forge events.
IForgeEvent.EntityEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired for Forge entity events.
IForgeEvent.InitEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event

IForgeEvent.WorldEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event

IFramePart - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Defines metadata for a script hook, enabling rich hook registration with proper type information for stub generation, imports, and documentation.

IItemBook - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.item
 
IItemCustom - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.item
 
IItemCustomizable - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.item
 
IItemEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events fired for scripted/customizable items during their lifecycle and interactions.
IItemEvent.AttackEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item is used to attack an entity.
IItemEvent.BreakItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item breaks due to durability loss or consumption.
IItemEvent.FinishUsingItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player finishes using the item (full duration).
IItemEvent.InitEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item is initialized.
IItemEvent.InteractEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item is used to interact with an entity.
IItemEvent.PickedUpEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item is picked up.
IItemEvent.RepairItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item is repaired on an anvil.
IItemEvent.RightClickEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item is right-clicked.
IItemEvent.SpawnEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item entity spawns in the world.
IItemEvent.StartUsingItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player starts using the item (e.g., drawing a bow).
IItemEvent.StopUsingItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player stops using the item before completion.
IItemEvent.TossedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the item is tossed/dropped.
IItemEvent.UpdateEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired each tick while the item exists in an entity's inventory.
IItemEvent.UsingItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired each tick while the player is using the item.

IItemSlot - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.gui

IItemStack - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.item

ILine - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.gui
Represents a line component in a custom GUI.
ILine - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Represents a single NPC dialog line with text, an optional sound, and target formatting.
ILines - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
A collection of dialog lines, supporting creation, indexed access, and random retrieval.
ILinkedItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Represents a linked item definition.
ILinkedItemEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events fired for linked items when their version changes or when they are being built.
ILinkedItemEvent.BuildEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the linked item is being built/constructed.
ILinkedItemEvent.VersionChangeEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the linked item's version changes.
ILinkedItemHandler - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Handles registration and retrieval of linked items.
IMagic - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Represents a magic element that can have interactions with other magics.
IMagicCycle - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Represents a cycle (or category) grouping for magics.
IMagicData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
 
IMagicHandler - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Provides methods to access and modify magic and magic cycles.
IMark - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity.data
Represents a mark that can be applied to an entity.
IModelData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity.data
Provides configuration data for a model including wearable settings, hidden parts, rotation, and scale.
IModelRotate - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity.data
Represents the rotation configuration for a model.
IModelRotatePart - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity.data
Represents the rotation settings for a specific part of a model.
IModelScale - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity.data
Represents the scaling configuration for a model.
IModelScalePart - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity.data
Represents the scale configuration for a specific part of a model.

Represents a monster entity.
INaturalSpawn - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Configures a natural spawn entry for custom NPCs, including entity templates, biome restrictions, spawn conditions, and cooldowns.
INaturalSpawnsHandler - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Handles natural spawn configurations for custom NPCs.
INbt - Interface in noppes.npcs.api
A scripted data representation of an MC NBTTagCompound object.

INpcEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events fired for CustomNPC entities during their lifecycle and interactions.
INpcEvent.CollideEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an entity collides with the NPC.
INpcEvent.DamagedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC takes damage.
INpcEvent.DialogClosedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a dialog with the NPC is closed.
INpcEvent.DialogEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a dialog opens with the NPC.
INpcEvent.DiedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC dies.
INpcEvent.InitEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC is initialized.
INpcEvent.InteractEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a player interacts with the NPC.
INpcEvent.KilledEntityEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC kills an entity.
INpcEvent.MeleeAttackEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC performs a melee attack.
INpcEvent.RangedLaunchedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC launches a ranged attack.
INpcEvent.SwingEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC swings its weapon.
INpcEvent.TargetEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC acquires a new target.
INpcEvent.TargetLostEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the NPC loses its current target.
INpcEvent.TimerEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an NPC timer triggers.
INpcEvent.UpdateEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired each tick for the NPC.

IPartyEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events fired during party operations such as quest progress, invitations, kicks, and disbanding.

Fired when the party is disbanded.
IPartyEvent.PartyInviteEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a player is invited to the party.
IPartyEvent.PartyKickEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a player is kicked from the party.
IPartyEvent.PartyLeaveEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a player voluntarily leaves the party.
IPartyEvent.PartyQuestCompletedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a party quest is completed.
IPartyEvent.PartyQuestSetEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a quest is assigned to the party.
IPartyEvent.PartyQuestTurnedInEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a party quest is turned in.
IPartyHandler - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
 
IPartyOptions - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Configures party-related options for quests, controlling membership requirements, reward distribution, completion rules, and party size limits.
IPixelmon<T extends net.minecraft.entity.passive.EntityTameable> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents a Pixelmon (a tameable creature) with additional attributes such as shiny state, level, IV/EV values, nature, moves, and more.
IPixelmonPlayerData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api
Provides access to a player's Pixelmon data, including party and PC storage.
IPlayer<T extends net.minecraft.entity.player.EntityPlayerMP> - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.entity
Represents a player in the game with methods for managing dialogs, quests, inventory, sound, and more.
IPlayerAbilityData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.ability
Interface for managing player abilities.
IPlayerAttributes - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Represents a collection of a player's custom attributes.
IPlayerBankData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Holds bank-related data for a player.
IPlayerData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Provides access to all persistent data categories for a player, including companion, dialog, quest, faction, transport, mail, trade, and ability data.
IPlayerDialogData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Tracks which dialogs a player has read.
IPlayerEffect - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Represents an active custom effect instance on a player.
IPlayerEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Events fired for player actions including combat, items, movement, and interactions.
IPlayerEvent.AchievementEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player earns an achievement.
IPlayerEvent.AttackedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player is attacked (before armor reduction).
IPlayerEvent.AttackEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player attacks an entity.
IPlayerEvent.BonemealEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player uses bonemeal on a block.
IPlayerEvent.BreakEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player breaks a block.
IPlayerEvent.ChangedDimension - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player changes dimensions.
IPlayerEvent.ChatEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player sends a chat message.
IPlayerEvent.ContainerClosed - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player closes a container.
IPlayerEvent.ContainerOpen - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player opens a container.
IPlayerEvent.DamagedEntityEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player deals damage to an entity (after hit).
IPlayerEvent.DamagedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player takes damage (after armor reduction).
IPlayerEvent.DiedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player dies.
IPlayerEvent.DropEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when items are dropped from the player's inventory (e.g., on death).

Events fired for player custom effects (add, tick, remove).

Fired when an effect is added to the player.
IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent.Removed - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when an effect is removed from the player.
IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent.Ticked - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired each tick while the effect is active.
IPlayerEvent.FallEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player falls.
IPlayerEvent.FillBucketEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player fills a bucket.
IPlayerEvent.FinishUsingItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player finishes using an item (full duration).

Fired when the player script is initialized.
IPlayerEvent.InteractEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player interacts with an entity.
IPlayerEvent.JumpEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player jumps.
IPlayerEvent.KeyPressedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player presses or releases a key.
IPlayerEvent.KilledEntityEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player kills an entity.
IPlayerEvent.LevelUpEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player levels up.
IPlayerEvent.LightningEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player is about to be struck by lightning.
IPlayerEvent.LoginEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player logs in.
IPlayerEvent.LogoutEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player logs out.
IPlayerEvent.MouseClickedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player clicks a mouse button.
IPlayerEvent.PickUpEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player picks up an item.
IPlayerEvent.PickupXPEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player picks up experience orbs.

Events fired for profile operations (create, change, remove).

Fired when a new profile is created.
IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent.Removed - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a profile is removed.
IPlayerEvent.RangedChargeEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player begins charging a ranged weapon.
IPlayerEvent.RangedLaunchedEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player launches a ranged weapon (e.g., bow).
IPlayerEvent.RespawnEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player respawns after death.
IPlayerEvent.RightClickEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player right-clicks.
IPlayerEvent.SleepEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player sleeps in a bed.
IPlayerEvent.SoundEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a sound is played for the player.
IPlayerEvent.StartUsingItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player starts using an item (e.g., drawing a bow).
IPlayerEvent.StopUsingItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player stops using an item before completion.
IPlayerEvent.TimerEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when a player timer triggers.
IPlayerEvent.TossEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player tosses a single item.
IPlayerEvent.UpdateEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired each tick for the player.
IPlayerEvent.UseHoeEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player uses a hoe on a block.
IPlayerEvent.UsingItem - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired each tick while the player is using an item.
IPlayerEvent.WakeUpEvent - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.event
Fired when the player wakes up from a bed.
IPlayerFactionData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Tracks a player's faction standing points.
IPlayerItemGiverData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Tracks item giver interaction data for a player, including cooldown timestamps and interaction history.
IPlayerMail - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler.data
Represents a mail message sent to a player, containing pages of text, sender info, optional quest, and item attachments.

Manages a player's mail inbox, including sending, removing, and querying mail.
IPlayerQuestData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Tracks a player's quest progress, including active, finished, and tracked quests.
IPlayerTradeData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Interface for player trade data (currency and auction claims).
IPlayerTransportData - Interface in noppes.npcs.api.handler
Tracks which transport locations a player has unlocked.

resume() - Method in interface noppes.npcs.api.handler.data.IAction
Resumes thread that was previously paused by IAction.pause(), IAction.pauseUntil(Function), IAction.pauseFor(int) or IAction.pauseFor(long) Must be called from a different thread than the IAction one, as that one is paused, so it won't reach this function if it comes after any of the pausing functions.
